title: `execute update` statement returns unexpected errors when using Plan Cache in some corner cases
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (id Int32, value Decimal(10,5), description String);
INSERT INTO t4 VALUES (1, 123.45678, 'Valid entry'), (2, 0.00000, 'Zero entry');
ALTER TABLE t4 UPDATE value = NULL WHERE id = 2;
SELECT * FROM t4 WHERE value IN (NULL, 'invalid');
key_bug_features: execute prepared statement with invalid decimal value
